### Overview

The Topcoder Community App is the main application used to display challenges, handle registration, and accept submissions on the Topcoder platform.

You can find the source code here:

https://github.com/topcoder-platform/community-app

### Local deployment

Instructions for deploying and building the community app locally can be found here:

https://platform-ui.topcoder.com/dev-...

This challenge is intended to source highly qualified native speakers for a 3-month contract position working full-time (8 hours/day) to support operations. The selected candidates will be part of an urgent initiative and are expected to support global projects. This opportunity is location agnostic.

In this First2Finish challenge, we need to perform several maintenance tasks on the TC Review API codebase to ensure code quality, resolve merge conflicts, and fix existing issues. The tasks include merging branches, applying patches, fixing dependency warnings, and resolving lint errors.

### Technology Stack

- Backend: Node.js with NestJS
- Package Manager: pnpm
- Version Control: Git
